title: Implement intent-discovery evidence path

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1251 by making intent source, assumptions, and correction points visible through startup, implement, and closeout/report.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Preserve agent judgment; do not add keyword-based hard gates or require clarification for every vague prompt.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact packet fields, compact projections, schema wording, and scenario fixture shape.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct fix requires a new hard clarification gate, broad Planning semantics, or changes outside startup/implement/report evidence projection.
canonical_core.next_action: Finish validation and close out the intent-evidence implementation.
proof_expectations: Focused startup/implement/report tests prove scenario evidence.
Workspace lint and schema/reference checks prove contract consistency.
completion_criteria: Startup exposes intent_evidence for ask-human and issue-backed proceed-with-assumption scenarios.
Implement tiny context exposes compact intent_evidence for changed-path work.
Closeout report exposes intent provenance alongside interpreted intent.
Direct small fixes remain light and do not show intent-discovery interruption.

goal: Create a bounded plan for Implement intent-discovery evidence path.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Agents and reviewers can cheaply see whether broad or vague work preserved human intent or proceeded under visible assumptions.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Startup, implement, and closeout/report can share a compact intent-source evidence path.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: yes; planning closeout recorded explicit proof input.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: None for this archived slice; reopen only if new evidence invalidates the proof.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: none unless validation reveals a narrower follow-up

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Make skipped or assumption-based intent discovery visible without replacing agent judgment with prompt keywords.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add a reusable intent_evidence packet, compact projections, schemas/docs, and scenario tests.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the packet exposes provenance and assumptions without changing ordinary permission behavior.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: workspace runtime primitives, workspace schemas, workspace report reference doc, focused workspace tests, and this closeout plan.
execution_bounds.max changed files: about 10 tracked files plus generated/reference updates if required by validation.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: focused pytest for startup/implement/report, make test-workspace, make lint-workspace, contract tooling checks, maintainer surfaces, schema reference docs, generated command package checks if required.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before adding a new hard clarification gate, new subsystem, or changing Planning archive/closeout semantics beyond report projection.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Validate the intent_evidence packet across start, implement, and closeout/report, then close this plan.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

post_decomposition_delegation.decision rule: After this slice is bounded, decide whether direct work, read-only exploration, implementation handoff, validation handoff, or stronger review improves quality or saves tokens safely.
